title: The Coconut Development Board Act, 1979
full_text: The Coconut Development Board Act, 1979 नारियल विकास बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1979 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197905 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1979-03-17 Act Year: 1979 Short Title: The Coconut Development Board Act, 1979 Hindi Title: नारियल विकास बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1979 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development under the control of the Union of the coconut industry and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 12-01-1981 Notification: 12th January, 1981, vide notification No. G.S.R. 13(E), dated 12th January, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
